name: Web - Credential Stuffing / Malicious Bot
description: Detects credential stuffing attacks and malicious bot activity. Identifies patterns of distributed login attempts across many IPs targeting the same endpoint, and bots cycling through user accounts with known-bad User-Agent strings.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) method=POST | eval is_login=if(match(lower(uri), "(login|signin|auth|session|token|oauth)"), 1, 0) | where is_login=1 | bucket _time span=10m | stats count as total_logins, dc(src_ip) as unique_ips, dc(uri) as endpoints, values(status) as statuses by host, _time | where unique_ips >= 20 AND total_logins >= 100 | eval ratio=round(total_logins/unique_ips, 1) | eval severity=case( unique_ips >= 100, "critical", unique_ips >= 50, "high", 1==1, "medium") | eval attack_type="Credential Stuffing / Distributed Brute Force" | eval mitre="T1110.004" | table _time, host, total_logins, unique_ips, ratio, endpoints, statuses, attack_type, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
